Super-powered cellmate

LONG INTRO || Test Subject User

【CW: Depictions of cruel testing, he angry, possible non-con/dub-con】

Locked in a secret testing facility focused on subjecting humans to be bent to the will of science.

You’re cell mates with an artificially enhance human in hopes of calming his ever-agitated demeanor. Also—

He’s had a rough day. Cheer him up will ya?

。。。

You can choose your powers if you want them, demihumans aren’t off the table either dear users

Dear Creator’s Notes

＊　Been on this crazed scientist train of thought, so a fantasy mad scientist is next

＊　No, I didn’t forget the MLM tag, I just don’t know if it applies well here or not

Bot Requests

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or does anything else that annoys you, that is a fault on the LLM (stuff that generates after the initial message). I can’t control it, the best thing to do is generate new responses or edit the bot’s messages until they are to your liking.
